functions.name: FloorMapEditor
params:
{
  floorId, floorMeta,
  initialImageUrl, initialImageWidth, initialImageHeight,
  initialSvgContent,
  initialRegionsJson, initialGraphJson,
  professors,
}

functions.name: FloorMapViewer
params: { imageUrl, imageWidth, imageHeight, svgContent, regionsJson, graphJson, professors, lang }

functions.name: SelectContent
params:
{
  className,
  children,
  side = "bottom",
  sideOffset = 4,
  align = "center",
  alignOffset = 0,
  alignItemWithTrigger = true,
  ...props
}

functions.name: extractViewBox
functions.returnType: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number } | null

functions.name: detectedRoomsToRegions
functions.returnType: { rooms: Array<{ id: string; polygon: [number, number][]; label: string }> }
